member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Data.Model.InventoryEntity.PreorderAvailabilityDate
member.summary: The date from when the preorder is allowed. If not set AllowPreorder has no effect and not available

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Data.Model.InventoryEntity.BackorderAvailabilityDate
member.summary: The date from when the backorder is allowed. If not set AllowBackorder has no effect and not available

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Data.Search.Indexing.ProductAvailabilityChangesProvider
member.summary: Extend product indexation process. Invalidate products as changed when products availability in fulfillment centers updated.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Data.Search.Indexing.ProductAvailabilityChangesProvider.#ctor(VirtoCommerce.Platform.Core.ChangeLog.IChangeLogSearchService,VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Core.Services.IInventoryService)
member.summary: Extend product indexation process. Invalidate products as changed when products availability in fulfillment centers updated.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Data.Search.Indexing.ProductAvailabilityDocumentBuilder
member.summary: Extends product indexation process and provides available_in field for indexed products

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Data.Search.Indexing.ProductAvailabilityDocumentBuilder.#ctor(VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Core.Services.IInventorySearchService)
member.summary: Extends product indexation process and provides available_in field for indexed products
